subject: [PATCH 13/24] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds notification handlers for directory events in the NFS daemon (nfsd). It introduces a new fsnotify group for directories and modifies existing code to handle directory creation, deletion, and modification notifications. The patch also allocates a nfsd_notify_event object and sets up callback functions to handle these notifications. If any errors occur during this process, it recalls affected delegations. This change aims to improve the handling of directory events in NFS, enabling more robust and efficient notification mechanisms.
